description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle (Vehicle 1), operating in manual mode, was heading south on Alabama Street, in the southbound lane, approaching 
Mariposa Street in San Francisco, when it encountered a passenger car (Vehicle 2) traveling north and occupying both the northbound and 
southbound lanes on Alabama Street. The Zoox vehicle slowed and moved to the right for the oncoming Vehicle 2; however, as Vehicle 2 
passed, its driver's side mirror made contact with the driver's side rear of the Zoox vehicle. The driver of Vehicle 2 failed to stop and 
exchange information. The Zoox vehicle did not sustain any damage, but Vehicle 2 appeared to have sustained minor damage to its driver's 
side mirror. There were no reported injuries, and the police were not notified.
Print
Clear Form
